programme.title: Angry Planet | Italia Wild
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption; both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Angry Planet | By Camel to Timbuktu
programme.desc: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous “Ships of the Desert”. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Two players remain, but only one can claim the title of WPT Choctaw Champion. Both Chance Kornuth and Steve “Cuz” Buckner begin this heads up match with nearly even stacks in what promises to be an epic battle. The winner will receive $486,600 and their name forever engraved on the coveted Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup. Tune in to the crowning of a WPT Champion in this epic conclusion of the WPT Choctaw Main Event.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: The Final Table of the first ever WPT Ladies Championship at Wynn Las Vegas is set. Kathy Liebert, Jamie Kerstetter, Olga Iermolcheva, Lina Niu, Cindy Spier, and Dusti Smith round out our final six. Find out who has what it takes to become the first WPT Ladies Champion and take home the first place prize of $105,136.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: Six talented poker competitors remain in the first ever WPT Ladies Championship. Lina Niu has the chip lead, but Olga Iermolcheva is right on her heels. Tension is rising as the short stacks are being forced to make their move to stay alive. It’s anyone’s game as final table action gets back underway at Wynn Las Vegas.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: One of poker’s top female earners of all time, Kathy Leibert finds herself as the shortest stack at the table with only four women remaining. Watch Kathy reach into her bag of tricks as she attempts to battle back in hopes of becoming the first ever WPT Ladies Champion.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Only three ladies remain in the battle for over $100,000 and the title of WPT Ladies Champion. Olga Iermolcheva has a commanding chip lead, but her competitors are showing no signs of backing down. Prepare for plenty of thrilling poker action under the lights at Wynn Las Vegas as we play down to the crowning of the first ever WPT Ladies Champion.

programme.title: S1E1 Tour
programme.desc: Pursuing the Tour de France, one of the most physically demanding sporting events in the world, covers over 3,535 kilometers in just three weeks. Every young cyclist dreams of competing in this prestigious race, but only nine riders from each team make the cut. Young cyclist Adam Yates is giving everything he has to prove he belongs on cycling’s biggest stage. 2016 Tour de France winner Chris Froome reflects on the long and grueling journey to victory, while former professional cyclists and Tour de France veterans Jens Voigt, Christian Vande Velde, and Haimar Zubeldia reveal what it truly takes to compete at the highest level.

programme.title: S1E1 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.
